## Runtime.ChocolateLibrary.scaleRecipeByFactor() method

Scales a recipe by a multiplicative factor

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleRecipeByFactor(id: RecipeId, factor: number, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IScaledRecipeVersion>;
```
